title: Sales Manager
description:
Our client is a global leader in unified communications and collaboration solutions, specializing in cutting-edge voice, video, and cloud technologies. Their products and services empower businesses worldwide with seamless connectivity and enhanced communication efficiency.

Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver compelling sales presentations to C-level executives, demonstrating a deep understanding of customer business challenges and identifying opportunities to add value.
  • Recommend tailored solutions that align with customers' workflows and digital transformation goals.
  • Collaborate effectively with channel and technology partners to develop winning go-to-market strategies.
  • Build strong, trusted relationships with key stakeholders, becoming a strategic advisor and thought partner.
  • Contribute to marketing strategy development targeted at specific segments within the Indian market.
  • Lead the preparation of RFI/RFP responses, statements of work, and commercial proposals, including software licensing terms.
  • Serve as a key presenter during high-stakes moments in the sales cycle, building influence and credibility in both new and existing enterprise accounts.

Qualifications & Requirements

  • Proven experience selling to enterprise clients and influencing decisions at the C-suite level.
  • Strong presentation, communication, and stakeholder management skills, with a clear sense of mission and professionalism.
  • Solid understanding of IT infrastructure and networking fundamentals; experience with Microsoft O365 solutions such as Teams and Skype for Business is a plus.
  • Demonstrated success in structuring and closing complex deals involving multiple stakeholders.
  • Existing network within the SEA enterprise or public sector market is highly desirable.
  • Based in Singapore, with ability to travel regionally as required.


By applying to this job advertisement or responding to our messages, you acknowledge and consent to being contacted by PDR Group and its representatives through various communication channels (including but not limited to phone calls, emails, text messages, and messaging platforms such as WhatsApp or LinkedIn) regarding current and future job opportunities.

You may withdraw your consent at any time by notifying us in writing.

Ong Wen Jie
Reg No: R21101312
PDR GROUP (SEA) PTE. LTD.
EA License No: 202424414Z

postedCompany.description:
PDR Group
A Global Provider of Integrated Talent Solutions

PDR Group is a global provider of integrated talent solutions, trusted by over 10,000 organizations.
We are committed to shaping the future of talent by connecting individuals from all backgrounds with meaningful opportunities. In doing so, we foster a sustainable talent ecosystem where both talent and businesses can grow and thrive together.

Since 2006, PDR has leveraged nearly two decades of deep industry expertise to build a strong presence across 300+ cities in China and Southeast Asia. Through our “One Contract, Global Delivery” model, we’ve enabled over 6 million individuals to access career opportunities across 20+ industries, including electric vehicles, automotive, consumer electronics, hospitality, manufacturing, healthcare & pharmaceuticals, e-commerce, logistics & supply chain, banking & finance, and contact centers.

Our six core service lines—global executive search, outsourcing, recruitment, staffing, early career programs, and HR consulting—form a scalable, cross-industry platform for delivering tailored, future-ready talent solutions.

We put clients first, combining strategic insight with executional excellence to deliver results at scale. Our industry-leading capabilities and cross-regional network have earned us top recognition and the continued trust of leading organizations, including Fortune 500 companies, across regions.
